macro.title: Iran conflict lifts mortgage rates, but housing demand stays positive
macro.what: Pending sales rose to 63,971 versus 61,143 in 2025, inventory ended at 844,011, and price cuts were 39.57% versus 41%.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: U.S. Pending Home Sales Rise to Highest Level in 6 Weeks
macro.what: Pending home sales ticked up as housing payments temporarily dipped down
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Trump didn’t sign it, but the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act is now law
housing.what: The legislation, aimed at cutting red tape and making homeownership more attainable, is now the law of the land after President Donald Trump declined to sign or veto the bill befor
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Plaintiffs oppose Veterans United motion to dismiss amended RESPA class-action suit
housing.what: Fifteen named plaintiffs allege that Veterans United Home Loans
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Rechat’s Testimonials tool turns client praise into marketing content
housing.what: Rechat said many agents currently rely on multiple platforms, leaving reviews scattered across websites or stored as screenshots and emails.
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: Housing affordability is improving as wages outpace home-price growth
housing.what: Inventory is 1.56 million with 4.6 months of supply, helping keep 1.8% home-price growth below wage gains running near 3.5%.
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: New policy impact may ignite a manufactured housing blue-sky era
housing.what: ROAD to Housing Act would make the permanent chassis optional, enabling new designs and potential lower-cost financing paths.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: OpenAI, Anthropic Employees Could Buy Nearly One-Third of All Homes in San Francisco With IPO Earnings
housing.what: A new Redfin analysis takes a look at how much Bay Area real estate OpenAI and Anthropic employees could hypothetically purchase with their IPO earnings, in the wake of two massively valuable AI companies filing confidentially to go public
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: There Are Now Only 5 Major Metros Where A Typical Luxury Home Costs Less Than $1 Million
housing.what: The number of major metros where you can buy a luxury home for less than $1 million is down to five from eight last year
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Luxury Homes Cost 9 Times More Than the Typical Homes in These South Florida “Wealth Magnet” Metros
housing.what: West Palm Beach, FL, where the typical luxury home costs 8.9 times more than the typical non luxury home, has the nation’s biggest luxury home price premium
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: Century 21 COO says M&A activity fueled by growing tech demands
notables.what: Century 21 has completed 16 merger and acquisition deals in 2026, following 24 transactions last year
notables.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
notables.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: American Real Estate Association warns Missouri ballot measures could raise homeownership costs
notables.what: ARA said the two ballot measures would allow lawmakers to raise taxes while limiting the public’s ability to respond.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Data centers emerge as real estate’s newest pricing wildcard
notables.what: Agents and appraisers detail how data centers are reshaping real estate markets by creating both opportunities and challenges.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
